ACT_NO_CITY: Activity is not linked to a city
AI_CITY_MISMATCH_FROM: Booking departs from "{booking}", the trip says "{trip}". Check this is the right booking
AI_CITY_MISMATCH_TO: Booking arrives in "{booking}", the trip says "{trip}". Check this is the right booking
AI_LAYOVER_CITY_MISMATCH: Layover city does not match: arrival "{a}", departure "{b}"
AI_LAYOVER_UNRESOLVED: Couldn't locate the layover city: {cities}. Pick it manually.
CHAT_SEND_FAILED: Could not send the message. Try again
CITY_GAP: Gap of more than a day between «{a}» and «{b}»
CITY_ORDER: Departure date cannot be before arrival
CITY_OVERLAP: «{a}» and «{b}» overlap by more than a day
FX_RATE_INVALID: Rate must be a number greater than 0
FX_RATE_MISSING: Rate not found, enter it manually
HOTEL_CHECKIN_OOB: Hotel check-in is before arrival in {city}
HOTEL_CHECKIN_REQUIRED: Set the check-in date and time
HOTEL_CHECKOUT_OOB: Hotel check-out is after departure from {city}
HOTEL_CHECKOUT_REQUIRED: Set the check-out date and time
HOTEL_NO_CITY: Hotel is not linked to a city
INS_DATE_ORDER: Insurance end date must be after start date
PRO_ALREADY_ACTIVE: You already have an active subscription. Open Settings to change the plan
PRO_IFRAME: Open the app in a new tab to pay
PRO_RECENT_PENDING: A recent payment is still processing. Wait a few seconds, the plan will update automatically
SEG_ARR_REQUIRED: Set the arrival date and time
SEG_BACKSTEP: Departure is before the previous segment arrives
SEG_DEP_REQUIRED: Set the departure date and time
SEG_MIN: Layover transfer selected: at least 2 segments needed. Or switch to a direct transfer
SVC_DROPOFF_REQUIRED: Set the return date and time
SVC_PICKUP_REQUIRED: Set the pickup date and time
TRIP_NO_CITIES: Add at least one city to the route
TR_ARR_DAY: Arrival is too far from the day you reach {to}
TR_ARR_REQUIRED: Set the arrival date and time
TR_DEP_DAY: Departure is too far from the day you leave {from}
TR_DEP_REQUIRED: Set the departure date and time
TR_NOT_ADJACENT: Route does not connect: {from} → {to} are not adjacent
TR_NO_CITY: Transfer is not linked to a city
panel_subtitle: {n} in this trip, tap to open the event
